dry.name: Dry Skin
dry.description: Your skin tends to feel tight, flaky, or rough. It lacks natural oils and needs extra hydration and nourishment.
tips: Use a gentle, cream-based cleanser
Layer hydrating serums (hyaluronic acid)
Apply a rich moisturizer morning and night
Avoid harsh exfoliants and alcohol-based toners
Consider a facial oil as the last step

oily.name: Oily Skin
oily.description: Your skin produces excess sebum, leading to shine, enlarged pores, and potential breakouts. The good news: oily skin ages slower!
tips: Use a gel or foam cleanser twice daily
Don't skip moisturizer — use a lightweight, oil-free one
Incorporate niacinamide to regulate sebum
Use clay masks weekly
Blotting papers are your friend

combination.name: Combination Skin
combination.description: Your T-zone (forehead, nose, chin) tends to be oily while your cheeks are normal to dry. You need a balanced approach.
tips: Use a gentle, balanced cleanser
Apply lighter products on T-zone, richer on cheeks
Multi-mask: clay on T-zone, hydrating on cheeks
Look for gel-cream moisturizers
Niacinamide works great for balancing

sensitive.name: Sensitive Skin
sensitive.description: Your skin reacts easily to products and environmental factors. Redness, stinging, and irritation are common. Gentle is key.
tips: Patch test every new product
Stick to fragrance-free formulations
Use a minimal routine with proven gentle ingredients
Avoid hot water on your face
Look for products labeled 'for sensitive skin'

normal.name: Normal Skin
normal.description: Lucky you! Your skin is well-balanced with minimal concerns. Focus on maintenance and prevention.
tips: Maintain your routine — consistency is key
Focus on prevention with antioxidants and SPF
You can experiment with most product types
Don't over-complicate your routine
Prioritize sunscreen above all

aging.name: Anti-Aging
aging.description: Focus on boosting collagen, increasing cell turnover, and protecting against further damage.

acne.name: Acne & Blemishes
acne.description: Target bacteria, unclog pores, and reduce inflammation without over-drying.

hyperpigmentation.name: Dark Spots & Uneven Tone
hyperpigmentation.description: Brighten existing dark spots and prevent new ones from forming.

dehydration.name: Dehydration & Dryness
dehydration.description: Restore your skin's moisture barrier and lock in hydration at every step.

dullness.name: Dull & Lackluster Skin
dullness.description: Boost radiance with exfoliation, antioxidants, and glow-enhancing ingredients.
